div.head: The Ambassador in Uruguay (Dawson) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 287. Embtel 284, May 10.Not printed. In informal conversation yesterday PresidentJuan José Amezaga. mentioned purchase of Canadian frigate saying he hoped our Government perceived no objection. He even intimated that if we objected, matter would be reconsidered. However, he made it clear he considers purchase very advantageous and would be keenly disappointed if deal fell through.
While President did not ask me to consult Department, I should appreciate its views in case he reverts to matter.

Naval AttachéCapt. Forrest Tucker. reports Uruguayan Navy strongly desires prompt purchase Canadian vessel in question and turned to Canada only after applying unsuccessfully to US.In telegram 192, May 17, 1946, to Montevideo, the Department indicated acquiescence in this purchase (833.34/5–1346).
